channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Mistral releases a new open source model for speech generation
item.description:
📊 Score: 153 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: The model, which lets enterprises build voice agents for sales and customer engagement, puts Mistral in direct competition with the likes of ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI....

item.title: [2] [模型算法] Training the Knowledge Base through Evidence Distillation and Write-Back Enrichment
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:distillation(+25)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • L3-Tech:retrieval(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: The knowledge base in a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system is typically assembled once and never revised, even though the facts a query requires are often fragmented across documents and buried in irrelevant content. We argue that the knowledge base should be treated as a trainable component and propose WriteBack-RAG, a framework that uses...

item.title: [3] [模型算法] Neural Network Conversion of Machine Learning Pipelines
item.description:
📊 Score: 112 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:distillation(+25)
  • L2-Tech:knowledge distillation(+25)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Transfer learning and knowledge distillation has recently gained a lot of attention in the deep learning community. One transfer approach, the student-teacher learning, has been shown to successfully create ``small'' student neural networks that mimic the performance of a much bigger and more complex ``teacher'' networks. In this paper, we investig...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] Calibri: Enhancing Diffusion Transformers via Parameter-Efficient Calibration

item.title: [5] [模型算法] MuRF: Unlocking the Multi-Scale Potential of Vision Foundation Models
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have become the cornerstone of modern computer vision, offering robust representations across a wide array of tasks. While recent advances allow these models to handle varying input sizes during training, inference typically remains restricted to a single, fixed scale. This prevalent single-scale paradigm overlooks a...

item.title: [6] [行业动态] You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini

item.title: [7] [行业动态] Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription

📄 Summary: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages....
